name: lol-backoffice
description: Back office independiente para data analysis de League of Legends: colector de la API de Riot, base SQLite y panel web con filtros.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.collect: npm run build:server && node dist/collector/index.js collect
scripts.aggregate: npm run build:server && node dist/collector/index.js aggregate
